Solution Title: Withholding Tax Filings, DOR Good-Standing Letter & BMV Lien Removal
Question: I need help getting my payroll withholding tax filings caught up, securing my Indiana Dept. of Revenue Good-Standing/Compliance Letter, and removing a lien on my vehicle title.
Answer:
Withholding Tax Filings: We e-filed all four quarters of Form 941 via EFTPS, matched and reconciled every payroll deposit (no penalties), and filed the annual W-3—your IRS account now shows a zero balance.

DOR Good-Standing Letter: We logged into the Indiana DOR portal, paid the $15 processing fee, requested your official Good-Standing/Compliance Letter, and delivered the PDF to you.

BMV Lien Removal: We secured the lender-signed lien release (Form 20057), completed and submitted Indiana BMV Title Transaction Form 35112 with your title, and confirmed the lien was cleared within 7–10 business days.

All deliverables (941/W-3 reconciliation summary, DOR letter, BMV confirmation) are attached. Let me know if you need anything else! ?
